title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.1065 - Commercial banking, engagement in prohibited
text:
362.1065.  Commercial banking, engagement in prohibited. — Notwithstanding any other provision of sections 362.1010 to 362.1117, no family trust company shall engage in commercial banking.  However, a family trust company may establish accounts at financial institutions for its own purposes or on behalf of family members to whom it provides services under sections 362.1010 to 362.1117.
(L. 2017 H.B. 292)
